_comment: DESIGN EXEMPLAR (ADR-010) -- not a live record; lives outside metadata/ and is not validated. Illustrates the v2 shape for an end-of-course (EOC) assessment: variable enrollment across grades 7-12, a single instrument-level 'eoc' cut key (the axis-rule exception adopted from the colleague's amr.assessment_config.v1), and the canonical proficient_from benchmark. Scale-score values are illustrative placeholders.

source_documents.title: State Algebra I EOC cut scores + obtainable score range -- REPLACE placeholder values

assessment_system.name: Example State Algebra I End-of-Course Assessment

enrollment.note: EOC: one Algebra I standard, taken by students across enrolled grades 7-12. The cut is instrument-level, not grade-specific, so cutscores/scale_bounds are keyed once under 'eoc' (ADR-010) rather than copied across every enrolled grade.
